composer: Hideki Yamamoto, Hiroaki Shimizu, Yuka Watanabe
extraction_notes: Wikipedia source provided composer credits and port information (noting arranged background music for Neo Geo CD version and mixture of arranged and chiptune BGM for PC-Engine version), but contained no documented data on: tempo, keys, chord progressions, time signatures, melodic characteristics, energy levels, mode, SFX characteristics per character/area, overall audio style, or distinctive audio elements. Data tier T2 (empirical/qualitative) requires such qualitative descriptors, which are not present in source material.
